stemHtml: Near Bern, you want the true bearing from the station. What is the correct transmission?

options.b: G-ABCD, Bern Approach, request true bearing, I say again, request true bearing.
options.c: Bern Approach, G-ABCD, request QDM G-ABCD.
options.d: True bearing, true bearing, Bern approach, G-ABCD, request true bearing, G-ABCD.
